entry_a.title: Configure pytest-asyncio in auto mode
entry_a.content: Our pytest.ini sets asyncio_mode = auto so that `async def test_*` functions don't need the @pytest.mark.asyncio decorator. Forgetting to set this causes async tests to be silently skipped as coroutine warnings.

entry_b.title: pytest-asyncio auto mode required
entry_b.content: We standardized on asyncio_mode=auto in pyproject.toml. Without it async tests collect as coroutine-never-awaited warnings and no assertions run.

notes: Both entries advise the same rule: configure pytest-asyncio in auto mode. Wording differs but the claim is identical.
